education_req: S2, S1, D3 - Ilmu Komputer, Manajemen Informatika, Teknik Informatika
job_requirements: Skills and Qualifications | Technical Expertise: | Strong proficiency in programming languages like Python, R, or Java. | Experience with machine learning libraries and frameworks | Understanding of deep learning architectures and model training techniques. | Familiarity with cloud computing platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) is a plus. | Domain Knowledge: | Basic understanding of medical terminology and healthcare processes. | Ability to interpret and analyze medical data responsibly. | Additional Skills: | Excellent communication and collaboration skills. | Problem-solving and critical thinking abilities. | Attention to detail and strong work ethic. | MSc or PhD in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field, with experience in AI, is preferred.
job_responsibilities: Responsibilities | Design, develop, and implement cutting-edge AI solutions for a range of healthcare challenges, including disease prediction, clinical decision support, and medical image analysis. | Collaborate closely with clinicians, data scientists, and software engineers to ensure your solutions meet the needs of the healthcare community. | Build and maintain robust data pipelines for ingesting, cleaning, and pre-processing medical data. | Develop and train machine learning models using supervised and unsupervised learning techniques. | Evaluate and optimize model performance, ensuring real-world applicability and clinical relevance. | Participate in the deployment and integration of AI solutions into clinical workflows. | Stay up-to-date on the latest advancements in medical AI and contribute to the ongoing development of our AI capabilities.
